mapper.insert: INSERT INTO register(patient_id, patient_name, hospital_id, hospital_name, department, doctor_name, register_date, register_time, status, amount) VALUES(#{reg.patientId}, #{reg.patientName}, #{reg.hospitalId}, #{reg.hospitalName}, #{reg.department}, #{reg.doctorName}, #{reg.registerDate}, #{reg.registerTime}, 'pending', #{reg.amount})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(register_date) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM register WHERE register_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(register_date) ORDER BY date
SELECT department as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM register WHERE register_date >= DATE(NOW()) GROUP BY department
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register WHERE register_date = DATE(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register WHERE register_date = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
